entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Maikling likod na kumukumpleto sa diwa.

entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Isang aklatan ng kurso ay pinakamalakas kapag ang search query matches isang kilala skill, paksa, o standard.

entries.source: A crawlable directory of every guest learning chat entrypoint.
entries.value: Isang crawlable directory ng bawat guest pag-aaral chat entrypoint.

entries.source: A crawlable map of AI learning workflows that connects public guest modes, prompt starters, learning paths, and practical guides.

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: isang kritiko;

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Maaaring maging kapaki-pakinabang direktang paliwanag. Pero minsan ang pinakamahusay na paraan para maunawaan ang ideya ay paghirapan ito.

entries.source: A focused collection of inspir guides about {value1}, with prompts, study workflows, and related public learning modes.
entries.value: Nakatuong koleksyon ng mga gabay ng inspir tungkol sa {value1}, kasama ang mga prompt, mga workflow sa pag-aaral, at kaugnay pampubliko mga pag-aaral mode.

entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Libreng katuwang sa pag-aaral gamit ang AI para sa mga taong nagtuturo sa sarili.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Libreng AI tutor para sa mga estudyanteng gustong umunawa, hindi mangopya.

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Isang libreng pampublikong katuwang sa pag-aaral gamit ang AI para sa tutoring, pagsasanay, quiz, flashcard, debate, feedback sa pagsusulat, tulong sa coding, at pagpaplano ng pag-aaral.

entries.source: A free-to-access AI tutor layer that can fit your institution.
entries.value: AI tutor layer na libreng ma-access at maaaring umangkop sa iyong institusyon.

entries.source: A generic answer can make a worksheet look finished while leaving the misconception untouched. The math route links hints, step checks, Socratic questions, quizzes, and flashcards into one learning loop.
entries.value: Maaaring gawing mukhang tapos ng generic na sagot ang worksheet habang hindi nagagalaw ang maling akala. Ang math ruta mga link mga hint, hakbang sinusuri, Socratic mga tanong, mga quiz, at mga flashcard tungo sa isa pag-aaral loop.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Ang magandang AI workflow ng pamilya ay dapat gawing mas independent ang mag-aaral, hindi mas dependent. Mga magulang Maaari bang Gamitin mga pampublikong pahina sa see ano bawat mode ay meant sa gawin bago isang bata nagsisimula.

entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: May loop ang magandang session sa pag-aaral

entries.source: A good path does not end at the answer. It ends with a test, a correction, and a next repetition.
entries.value: Ang magandang landas ay hindi nagtatapos sa sagot. Nagtatapos ito sa test, correction, at susunod na pag-uulit.

entries.source: A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Isang silid ng ginabayang pangangatwiran para sa disiplinadong pagtatanong

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Hint na tumutulong nang hindi ibinibigay ang lahat.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Maaaring buksan ng mag-aaral ang Matutunan ang Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Hakbang Coach, mga quiz, o mga flashcard direkta sa guest mode mula sa ang directory ng mga pampublikong pag-aaral mode.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Ang mag-aaral na pumipili sa pagitan ng mga tool ay karaniwang nangangailangan ng isa tatlong bagay: isang structured curriculum, isang live tutor para sa puntong kinakapitan, o isang loop ng pagsasanay na nagpapatibay sa ideya.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Karaniwang dumadaan ang mag-aaral sa nakahandang video, artikulo, exercise, at dashboard.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Nagsisimula ang mag-aaral sa mode-specific chat at Maaari bang Humingi ng isang simpler model, isang mas mahirap tanong, isang quiz, isang flashcard deck, o isang kritika.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Isang estudyante, magulang, guro, at self-taught mag-aaral madalas search para sa ang same AI tutor sa different wika. Separate mga pahina Gumawa ng ang tama Gamitin mga kaso at safety boundaries mas malinaw.

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Isang kapaki-pakinabang card nagtatanong isa thing. Ito dapat hindi hide lima mga tanong inside isa prompt. Ito dapat maging tiyak enough sa sagot, pero hindi kaya narrow na ito becomes meaningless.

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Isang kapaki-pakinabang pangkasaysayan AI response dapat mayroon dalawa layers.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Isang mahina AI flashcard says:

entries.source: A weak prompt only names a topic. A strong prompt names the topic, the level, the sticking point, and the kind of help you want. Use this {value1} as the context, then ask the mode to make you do something with it.
entries.value: Isang mahina prompt lamang names isang paksa. Isang malakas prompt names ang paksa, ang antas, ang sticking punto, at ang kind ng tulong ikaw gusto. Gamitin ito {value1} bilang konteksto, pagkatapos magtanong ang mode gumawa ikaw gawin something kasama ang ito.

entries.source: A working next move, a clearer bug or concept, and a project path that teaches through doing.
entries.value: Isang working susunod lumipat, isang mas malinaw bug o konsepto, at isang proyekto landas na teaches sa pamamagitan ng doing.

entries.source: According to CalOPPA we agree to the following:Users can visit our site anonymously; our Privacy Policy link includes the word “Privacy”, and can easily be found on the home page of our website; Users will be notified of any privacy policy changes on our Privacy Policy Page; Users are able to change their personal information by emailing us at support@inspir.app
entries.value: According sa CalOPPA tayo sumasang-ayon sa ang following:Mga user Maaari bang visit aming site anonymously; aming Privacy Polisiya link kasama ang salita “Privacy”, at Maaari bang easily maging found sa ang home pahina ng aming website; Mga user magiging maging notified ng anumang privacy polisiya changes sa aming Privacy Polisiya Pahina; Mga user ay able sa change kanilang personal impormasyon ng emailing amin at support@inspir.app

entries.source: After every learner answer, identify the claim, reasoning, assumptions, gaps, contradictions, or corrected insight. Give one brief read of their answer, update the reasoning map with concise labels, then ask exactly one next-best question.
entries.value: Pagkatapos bawat mag-aaral sagot, identify ang pahayag, pangangatwiran, mga palagay, gaps, contradictions, o corrected insight. Give isa brief Basahin ng kanilang sagot, update ang pangangatwiran mapa kasama ang maikli labels, pagkatapos magtanong exactly isa next-best tanong.

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang tulong Gumawa ng mga flashcard faster, pero ang pag-aaral pa rin comes mula sa retrieval. Kung ang tool writes ang mga card at ang mag-aaral never struggles sa sagot sila, almost nothing mayroon changed. Ang kapaki-pakinabang version ginagawang magulo mga tala tungo sa nakapokus mga prompt, pagkatapos gumagawa ang mag-aaral recall bago revealing ang sagot.

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang tulong ikaw Matutunan ang faster. Ito Maaari bang also tulong ikaw avoid pag-aaral entirely.

entries.source: AI can make one-to-one learning dramatically more available.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang Gumawa ng one-to-one pag-aaral dramatically mas marami available.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI Maaari bang Gawing magaspang mga tala tungo sa cleaner retrieval mga prompt. Ito Maaari bang split broad mga ideya tungo sa smaller mga card, add mga halimbawa, at identify traps isang mag-aaral might miss.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments
entries.value: AI Debate Coach Para sa Sharper Mga argumento

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: AI Debate Coach Para sa Sharper Mga argumento ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Pumili anumang paksa at go head-to-head sa isang totoo debate. Pumili isang side, get challenged, at Matutunan ang gumawa mas mahusay mga argumento.
